raw_text: andrea lópez rodríguez +34 619443383 andrea317960hotmail.com personal information: birth date: 30-07-1996 born place: seville, spain residence place: lisbon, portugal profile: vocational industrial engineer (higher technical school of engineers of seville), with a high degree of commitment, decisive and hardworking. good ability adapting to multicultural and multidisciplinary environments with ease of communication and teamwork. education: current mechanical engineering international master student in instituto superior tecnico de lisboa-portugal industrial engineering degree - machine mechanisms, construction and materials group specialization - university of seville (2014-2019) e year-1 modules: engineering economics, general chemistry, physics i, physics ii, statistic and operational investigation, mathematics i, mathematics ii and mathematics iii. e year-2 modules: electrical circuits theory, physical ampliation, mathematics ampliation, thermodynamic, theory of machines and mechanisms, general electronic, elasticity and material resistance, basics of material science, fluid mechanic i, basics of automatic control and mathematics methods (matlab). e year-3 modules (specialization): structure theory, bases for the design of mechanical systems, materials technology, elasticity expansion and material resistance, vibrations i, kinematics and dynamics of machines, calculation, design and testing of machines, economics engineering ii, heat transfer, manufacturing technology i, manufacturing technology ii and installations and electric machines. e year-4. studied abroad in lisbon (instituto superior técnico) as an erasmus student. modules: structural dynamics and earthquake engineering, heat transfer ii, technical drawing and modeling i, vibrations and noise, environmental technology, metrology and quality, solid mechanic, project management, dynamics of mechanical systems, machine tools, fluidmechanic ii and introduction to materials engineering. pre-school, secondary school and high school - colegio aljarafe s.a. (2000-2014) british institute british english courses (2004-2012) work experience: physics and mathematics private teacher to secondary and high school students. languages: e native spanish speaker. e c2english level obtained with cambridge university. e bl portuguese level obtained in tecnico university of lisbon. e french basic level. being in classes four years during high school. interest additional information: e staying abroad o ireland: four months in carlow o united kingdom: two months in oxford o united states: three months in long island, new york and two months in california, la. o portugal: one complete year studying mechanical engineering with erasmus program at instituto superior técnico de lisboa e obtaining the second prize end of studies of obligatory secondary education of focus- abengoa foundation. e basketball player in the feminism seville team for 8 years.
